name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: Full model-behavior visualization on the active trade: trailed stop renders as a separate dashed-green horizontal_line when stop crosses into profit (TV's widget stopLevel is unsigned and would otherwise paint the band on the wrong side after BE-lock / cont-trail). Pyramid size shows in the widget's text header (L×3 / S×2). Halt state recolors active widget amber when runtime-status.halted=true. Closed-trade label gains [STOP]/[EE_LOCK]/[FLIP]/[MANUAL] suffix from broker_trades.exit_reason.
